lifeCompass.strategy.title: The map before action.
lifeCompass.strategy.principle: Strategy is the map. Execution is the sail.

items.label: Capability
items.text: Build useful skills through focused practice and visible projects.

items.label: Evidence
items.text: Create work that demonstrates judgment, reliability and momentum.

items.label: Path
items.text: Clarify the people, roles and places that fit the next season.

season.title: Create visible progress
season.summary: A focused season for turning intention into small, finished pieces of work.
points: Publish or share one piece of visible work.
Review the week and reduce unnecessary commitments.

rules.name: Protect Momentum
rules.text: Choose small, repeatable actions that keep the important work moving.

rules.name: Tell The Truth
rules.summary: Stay honest about what is working.
rules.text: Use honest reflection to notice drift, friction and real progress.

careerStory.title: From curiosity to useful work
careerStory.body: This story is a movement from broad curiosity toward practical contribution.
points: Where I have been: building skills, interests and self-knowledge.
Where I am now: turning direction into visible work and daily progress.
Where I am going: toward roles and projects where my strengths are useful.

longTermDirection: Build a life and career around useful skills, clear values and visible contribution.
Create a portfolio of work that can travel ahead of introductions.

Ideas.title: Review prototype
Ideas.description: Walk through the current template and note the next useful improvement.
